name: Logo.dev
tagline: Resolve company names to domains and fetch structured brand data
description: Search brand names to candidate domains, fetch structured company/brand data (description, colors, socials, logo) by domain, and identify a merchant from a raw card-transaction descriptor. Requires a Logo.dev secret API key; some endpoints require a paid plan or early-access enablement.

auth.hint: Get a secret key (sk_...) from the Logo.dev dashboard (Pro/Enterprise plans unlock more endpoints) and send it as Authorization: Bearer <YOUR_SECRET_KEY>. This is a different key from the publishable key (pk_...) used by the separate img.logo.dev image API.

tools.name: search_brands
tools.description: Resolve a brand name to up to 10 candidate domains, sorted by popularity, each with a logo image URL.

params.name: q
params.description: Brand name to search for, e.g. sweetgreen.

params.name: strategy
params.description: Matching strategy: "suggest" favors popular prefix matches (autocomplete); "match" favors exact/near-exact names. Defaults to suggest.

params.name: is_profane
params.description: Filter results by whether the brand is flagged as potentially inappropriate.

tools.name: describe_domain
tools.description: Get structured brand data for a domain: name, description, brand colors, social profiles, and logo. Requires any paid plan.

params.name: domain
params.description: Company domain to describe, e.g. sweetgreen.com.

tools.name: get_brand_profile
tools.description: Get a full brand profile for a domain: logo, brandmark, social banners, brand colors, description, and socials. Requires a Pro or Enterprise plan.

tools.name: identify_merchant
tools.description: Resolve a raw card-transaction descriptor to a merchant brand's name, domain, and logo. Early-access endpoint; requires enablement by Logo.dev sales.

params.name: transaction
params.description: Raw card-transaction descriptor, e.g. "SQ *BLUE BOTTLE 1523 OAKLAND CA".

params.name: country_code
params.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code where the transaction took place, e.g. US, to disambiguate.
